욥기 3:1.content: After this Job opened his mouth, and cursed the day of his birth.

욥기 3:3.content: “Let the day perish in which I was born, the night which said, ‘There is a boy conceived.’

욥기 3:4.content: Let that day be darkness. Don’t let God from above seek for it, neither let the light shine on it.

욥기 3:5.content: Let darkness and the shadow of death claim it for their own. Let a cloud dwell on it. Let all that makes black the day terrify it.

욥기 3:6.content: As for that night, let thick darkness seize on it. Let it not rejoice among the days of the year. Let it not come into the number of the months.

욥기 3:7.content: Behold, let that night be barren. Let no joyful voice come therein.

욥기 3:8.content: Let them curse it who curse the day, who are ready to rouse up leviathan.

욥기 3:9.content: Let the stars of its twilight be dark. Let it look for light, but have none, neither let it see the eyelids of the morning,

욥기 3:10.content: because it didn’t shut up the doors of my mother’s womb, nor did it hide trouble from my eyes.

욥기 3:11.content: “Why didn’t I die from the womb? Why didn’t I give up the spirit when my mother bore me?

욥기 3:12.content: Why did the knees receive me? Or why the breast, that I should nurse?

욥기 3:13.content: For now should I have lain down and been quiet. I should have slept, then I would have been at rest,

욥기 3:14.content: with kings and counselors of the earth, who built up waste places for themselves;

욥기 3:15.content: or with princes who had gold, who filled their houses with silver:

욥기 3:16.content: or as a hidden untimely birth I had not been, as infants who never saw light.

욥기 3:17.content: There the wicked cease from troubling. There the weary are at rest.

욥기 3:18.content: There the prisoners are at ease together. They don’t hear the voice of the taskmaster.

욥기 3:19.content: The small and the great are there. The servant is free from his master.

욥기 3:20.content: “Why is light given to him who is in misery, life to the bitter in soul,

욥기 3:21.content: Who long for death, but it doesn’t come; and dig for it more than for hidden treasures,

욥기 3:22.content: who rejoice exceedingly, and are glad, when they can find the grave?

욥기 3:23.content: Why is light given to a man whose way is hidden, whom God has hedged in?

욥기 3:24.content: For my sighing comes before I eat. My groanings are poured out like water.

욥기 3:25.content: For the thing which I fear comes on me, That which I am afraid of comes to me.

욥기 3:26.content: I am not at ease, neither am I quiet, neither have I rest; but trouble comes.”
